nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Change the camera angle to a first-person driver's perspective looking through the steering wheel at the dashboard and windshield, maintaining the same white minimalist interior style and lighting

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Apply the yellow "C" logo to the center hub of the steering wheel, and change the steering wheel color to royal blue matching the logo background, while maintaining the same interior style, lighting, camera angle, and all other elements unchanged

groups.title: Multiple input example（Select all nodes then Ctrl-B to enable/disable）

widgets_values:
Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model links (for local users)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-base-9b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9b-fp8)

> Please visit BFL's repo, accept the agreement in the repo, and then download the fp8 model.

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```
## Report issue

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: The node below is a subgraph. Learn more at [Subgraph docs](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

Apply the yellow "C" logo to the center hub of the steering wheel, and change the steering wheel color to royal blue matching the logo background, while maintaining the same interior style, lighting, camera angle, and all other elements unchanged
Change the camera angle to a first-person driver's perspective looking through the steering wheel at the dashboard and windshield, maintaining the same white minimalist interior style and lighting
